# Video Effects

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/videoEffects`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/videoEffects/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DhDWXhsI.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-video-effects`
- `query-video-effects-single`
- `query-video-effects-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/effects`
- `/v1/videos/effects/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Video Effects",zh:"视频特效"},endpoints:[{id:"create-video-effects",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/effects",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Total of 222 video effects are available. You can achieve different effects by calling effect_scene. For detailed list, please refer to: [Video Effects Center](/global/dev/document-api/quickStart/productIntroduction/effectsCenter)",zh:"当前一共支持 224 款特效，您可以根据调用 effect_scene heart_gesture_pro"}],children:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Image (for single-image effects)",zh:"参考图像（用于单图特效）"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: ≥300px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"images",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Image Group (for dual-character effects)",zh:"参考图像组（用于双人互动特效）"},notes:[{en:"- Array length must be 2. The first image uploaded will be positioned on the left side of the composite photo, and the second image uploaded will be positioned on the right side.",zh:"- 数组的长度必须是 2，上传的第一张图在合照的左边，上传的第二张图在合照的右边"},{en:"- This service includes composite photo functionality. Users upload two portrait images, and Kling AI will adaptively stitch them into a composite photo.\n![Composite Photo](https://p4-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/video-effects-group-photo.jpeg)",zh:"- 该服务包含合照功能，即用户上传两张人像图，可灵 AI 将自适应拼接为合照\n![合照效果](https://p4-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/video-effects-group-photo.jpeg)"},{en:"- Supports image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- **正确的 Base64 编码参数：**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: ≥300px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Customized Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- User-defined task ID. It will not override the system-generated task ID, but supports querying tasks by this ID",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Please note that it must be unique for each user",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, //错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", //错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", //请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data":{\n    "task_id": "string", //任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_info":{ //任务创建时的参数信息\n       "external_task_id": "string" //客户自定义任务ID\n    }, \n    "task_status": "string", //任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, //任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 //任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, //Error codes；Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", //Error information\n  "request_id": "string", //Request ID, generated by the system\n  "data":{ \n    "task_id": "string", //Task ID, generated by the system\n    "task_status": "string", //Task status, Enum values：submitted、processing、succeed、failed\n    "task_info":{ //Task creation parameters\n        "external_task_id": "string" //Customer-defined task ID\n    },\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, //Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 //Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit ms\n  }\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:'curl --request POST \\\n  --url https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/effects \\\n  --header \'Authorization: Bearer
```
